sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional optimal f adjusted by initial active equity level. Asymptotically superior to static fractional f. Apply 35-55% drawdown tolerance principle. Specific optimal f value and adjustment formula not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Trade at full optimal f for a given level of initial risk, adjusted by initial active equity, following dynamic fractional f methodology which is asymptotically superior to static fractional f
